projectDescription: A ROS-based autonomous agricultural robot that combines GPS/IMU-guided navigation with CNN-driven real-time crop-weed classification for hands-free weed removal in farm fields.
keyFeatures: Autonomous GPS + magnetometer-guided field navigation with skid-steer drive control
Moving Median and Kalman filter for sensor noise reduction
Bonnet CNN architecture for real-time pixel-level crop-weed segmentation
Full Gazebo simulation with farm field world, textured crop models, and sensor plugins
URDF/Xacro robot model with IMU, GPS, camera, and skid-steer plugins
Dual dataset support: CWFID and BoniRob (Bonn sugar-beets) datasets
Real-time webcam/video inference pipeline at ~2.5 fps on embedded GPU hardware
ROS action-based waypoint patrol and move_base integration
publicApiSurface: autonomus_drive.py — GPSAlgoV1() PD controller, ROS node 'autonomousdrive', topics: /agribot/cmd_vel, /angle, /distance
GPS_data_conversion.py — ll2xy(), xy2ll(), mdeglat(), mdeglon(), LLtoUTM(), UTMtoLL(), ROS node 'gps_converter', topics: /agribot/fix, /distance, /currentPose
data_manipulation.py — medianFilter(), angle_to_move(), ROS node 'data_manipulation', topics: /magnetic, /currentPose, Filteredheading, angle
AutonomusDriveAction.py — goal_pose(), ROS node 'patrol', move_base action client with waypoints list
model.py — small_Unet(labels, h, w, out_activation), bonnet(labels, h, w)
predict.py — predict(img) CLI: -i input_dir, -m model_weights, -r predictions_dir
real-time.py — realtime(src, modelweightspath) CLI: -v video, -m modelweights
pre-process.py — dataset preprocessing for CWFID and BoniRob
agribot_gazebo_simulation.launch — spawns AGRIBOT URDF into Gazebo with farm world
agribot_control.yaml — PID effort controllers for 4-wheel skid-steer joints
agribot_sensors.urdf.xacro — Gazebo plugins: skid_steer_drive, IMU (hector), GPS (hector), magnetometer
